title: Mailchimp vs Beehiiv (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Mailchimp and Beehiiv: pricing, features, and which email marketing tool suits your needs best.
h1: Mailchimp vs Beehiiv: Complete Comparison Guide
intro: Mailchimp and Beehiiv are both popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Mailchimp is the established generalist platform ideal for small businesses and e-commerce, while Beehiiv is purpose-built for newsletter publishers and content creators. This comparison will help you determine which tool aligns with your marketing goals.

comparison_table.tool_b: Newsletter monetization, ad network, referral program

choose_a_if: You're a beginner looking for an affordable, all-in-one marketing platform with landing pages and automation
You operate an e-commerce business and need to integrate email with sales tools and CRM
You want the lowest entry price with a generous free tier to test features first
choose_b_if: You're a newsletter creator or media operator focused on subscriber growth and monetization
You want access to an ad network and referral program built into your email platform
You need strong analytics and a web reader feature for a modern newsletter experience

faq.a: Neither is objectively better—they excel in different areas. Mailchimp is better for e-commerce and small business marketing with its broader feature set and lower price. Beehiiv is better for newsletter publishers seeking monetization and growth-focused tools. Your choice depends on your specific use case.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailchimp or Beehiiv?
faq.a: Mailchimp is significantly cheaper, starting at $13/month compared to Beehiiv's $39/month. However, Beehiiv offers a more generous free tier (2,500 vs 500 subscribers), which may reduce or eliminate costs for smaller publishers. Consider both the free tier limits and paid pricing when choosing.

faq.q: Can I switch from Beehiiv to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms allow you to export your subscriber lists and email content. However, some features like Beehiiv's monetization and referral network have no direct equivalent in Mailchimp, so you may lose those capabilities. Plan your migration carefully to preserve your audience and content.
